# AXEL

> AXEL is a premium multi-company, multi-currency ERP, CRM and French-compliant accounting platform for modern organisations.

AXEL unifies finance, customer relationships, operations, and full French accounting (Plan Comptable, Journal, Grand-Livre, Balance, Bilan, Compte de Résultat) in one workspace. It supports multi-entity groups, role-based access, live FX tracking, and an embedded AI assistant.

## Pages

- [Home](https://axel-command-center.lovable.app/): AXEL command center — sign in required.

## Optional

- [Product site](https://axel.weaxiom.com): Marketing, documentation, and release notes for AXEL.
